name: @logicn/observability
description: Actuator-style operational observability for a LogicN app: a health/liveness/readiness surface, app metrics (request counts, latencies, error rates), and structured app logs. The app-operator's ops view — distinct from @logicn/governance-telemetry (which exports governance STRUCTURE). Surfaces through the App Kernel as health routes + a metrics collector. Fail-closed, zero ambient authority.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
